config.name: proofpoint_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: proofpoint_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Email (6001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:03:25.040692

-- Pre-compile regex patterns for performance
local email_pattern = "%[(.-)%]"
local function extract_email(str)
    if not str then return nil end
    local email = string.match(str, email_pattern)
    return email or str
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local variables
    local output = {
        class_uid = 6001,
        class_name = "Email",
        category_uid = 6, 
        category_name = "Application Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 600101,
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "Proofpoint Email Security",
                vendor_name = "Proofpoint"
            },
            version = "1.0"
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    local ts = record.ts
    if ts then
        if type(ts) == "number" then
            output.time = ts
        elseif type(ts) == "string" then
            -- Convert string timestamp if needed
            local unix_ts = tonumber(ts)
            output.time = unix_ts or os.time() * 1000
        end
    else
        output.time = os.time() * 1000
    end

    -- Extract nested fields efficiently using local variables
    local msg = record.msg
    if msg and type(msg) == "table" then
        local header = msg.header
        if header then
            -- Process from address
            if header.from then
                output.src_endpoint = {
                    email_addr = extract_email(header.from)
                }
            end
            
            -- Process message ID
            if header["message-id"] then
                output.message_id = extract_email(header["message-id"])
            end
        end
    end

    -- Process DMARC auth results
    local filter = record.filter
    if filter and type(filter) == "table" then
        local modules = filter.modules
        if modules and type(modules) == "table" then
            local dmarc = modules.dmarc
            if dmarc and dmarc.authResults then
                output.email = {
                    auth_results = extract_email(dmarc.authResults)
                }
            end
        end
    end

    -- Validation of required OCSF fields
    if not output.time then
        return nil, "Missing required timestamp"
    end

    -- Add observability metadata
    output.metadata.processing = {
        timestamp = os.time() * 1000,
        parser_version = "1.0.0"
    }

    return output
end

-- Error handling wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
